Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class WebStoreTemplate

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.WebStoreTemplate
public class WebStoreTemplate extends Metadata

Java class for WebStoreTemplate complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WebStoreTemplate">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="autoFacetingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cartSummaryEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cartToOrderAutoCustomFieldMapping" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="checkoutTimeToLive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="checkoutValidAfterDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="commerceEinsteinActivitiesTracked" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="commerceEinsteinDeployed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="country" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}CountryIsoCode" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultCurrency" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultLanguage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="defaultTaxLocaleType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}TaxLocaleType"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="guestBrowsingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="guestCartEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="guestCartTimeToLive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="guestCheckoutEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="maxValuesPerFacet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="orderActivationStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="orderLifeCycleType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OrderLifeCycleType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="paginationSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pricingStrategy" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PricingStrategy"/>
         <element name="productGrouping" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ProductGrouping" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipAdditionalEntitlementCheckForSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="supportedCurrencies" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="supportedLanguages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="supportedShipToCountries" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WebStoreType"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
